caption: The video features a man playing the piano, likely providing a music lesson or tutorial. He is seated at a piano with various musical instruments, including a guitar and a trombone, visible in the background. The setting appears to be a studio with dark curtains and some decorative elements like plush toys hanging above. On the left side of the screen, chord names such as "A 7(no3) / E" and "D minor 3rd" are displayed, indicating the chords being played. The bottom part of the screen shows a close-up of the piano keys with red highlights on specific keys, guiding viewers on which notes to play. The man's hands are positioned on the keys, demonstrating the correct finger placement for the chords. The overall setup suggests an instructional video aimed at teaching piano techniques and chord progressions.
